meaning: n.[生化]降血钙素(一种调节血中含钙量之荷尔蒙)
examples: The contents of salmon calcitonin were decreased during the storage period.
Calcitonin can promote the development and implantation of mouse blastocysts.
Calcitonin gene was synthesized according to the sequence of salmon Calcitonin gene.
CGRP, which stands for calcitonin gene-related peptide neurotransmitter, has long been thought to play a role in migraines, but for much of that time for the wrong reason.
